sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112200" key="fou=ska" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φοῦσκα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n112200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">posca, sour wine,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.81</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:5:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
